text:
(In reply to dgilbert from comment #0)

strange, I have 2 freebsd install running samba 4.3 with active directory domain controller, with around 30 users, it works without problems

FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p2
samba43-4.3.11_1

note the files are stored on a freenas not on the DC
